languages.text: "Можно говорить свободно". {n}Наследница мгновенно сбрасывает маску скучающей светской дамы и принимается рассматривать вас с живым интересом.{/n} "Что ж. В первую очередь, запомни: для {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g} я — Элана. Для тебя теперь тоже". {n}Она делает небольшую паузу, словно оценивая, усвоили ли вы сказанное.{/n} "Не слышу возражений. Хороший знак. Перейдем к инструкциям".

traits.locale_text: "Можно говорить свободно". {n}Наследница мгновенно сбрасывает маску скучающей светской дамы и принимается рассматривать вас с живым интересом.{/n} "Что ж. В первую очередь, запомни: для {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g} я — Элана. Для тебя теперь тоже". {n}Она делает небольшую паузу, словно оценивая, усвоили ли вы сказанное.{/n} "Не слышу возражений. Хороший знак. Перейдем к инструкциям".

languages.text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

В первую очередь, запомни: для {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g} я — Элана. Для тебя теперь тоже". {n}Она делает небольшую паузу, словно оценивая, усвоили ли вы сказанное.{/n} "Не слышу возражений. Хороший знак. Перейдем к инструкциям".

To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections, which is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

"Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

languages.text: 「ようやく自由に話せるわ」{n}仮面を脱いだように、ジュベナは「退屈な貴族婦人」のふりを捨て、活発な興味を持ってあなたを観察し始める。{/n}「それでは、まずは、{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}異端審問会{/g}には私はエレーナ。あなたにも、今後はそう呼びます」{n}彼女はしばらく考えているようだが、あなたが彼女の言葉を理解したかどうかの判断をしているようにも見える。{/n}「異論はないわね。それは良い兆しよ。それでは、あなたの指示に移りましょう」
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: 「ようやく自由に話せるわ」{n}仮面を脱いだように、ジュベナは「退屈な貴族婦人」のふりを捨て、活発な興味を持ってあなたを観察し始める。{/n}「それでは、まずは、{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}異端審問会{/g}には私はエレーナ。あなたにも、今後はそう呼びます」{n}彼女はしばらく考えているようだが、あなたが彼女の言葉を理解したかどうかの判断をしているようにも見える。{/n}「異論はないわね。それは良い兆しよ。それでは、あなたの指示に移りましょう」

languages.text: “现在说话就方便了。”{n}像摘下面具一样，尤文娜瞬间收起那副“无聊贵小姐”的做派，转而兴致勃勃地打量起你来。{/n}“那好，头一件事，你得记住：在{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}眼里，我是埃拉娜。从现在起，对你也一样。”{n}她停顿了片刻，仿佛在掂量你是否领会了她的意思。{/n}“我没听见反对的声音。这是个好兆头。接着说你的任务吧。”
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: “现在说话就方便了。”{n}像摘下面具一样，尤文娜瞬间收起那副“无聊贵小姐”的做派，转而兴致勃勃地打量起你来。{/n}“那好，头一件事，你得记住：在{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}眼里，我是埃拉娜。从现在起，对你也一样。”{n}她停顿了片刻，仿佛在掂量你是否领会了她的意思。{/n}“我没听见反对的声音。这是个好兆头。接着说你的任务吧。”

languages.text: "Şimdi rahatça konuşabilirim." {n}Juvenna, maskesini atar gibi anında "sıkılmış soylu kadın" tavrından sıyrılıyor ve seni canlı bir ilgiyle gözlemlemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Her şeyden önce {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} için adım Elana. Bundan sonra ben Elana'yım." {n}Söylediklerini kavrayıp kavramadığını değerlendiriyormuşçasına duraksıyor.{/n} "İtiraz gelmedi. Bu iyiye işaret. Gelelim talimatlara."
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: "Şimdi rahatça konuşabilirim." {n}Juvenna, maskesini atar gibi anında "sıkılmış soylu kadın" tavrından sıyrılıyor ve seni canlı bir ilgiyle gözlemlemeye başlıyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ. Her şeyden önce {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon{/g} için adım Elana. Bundan sonra ben Elana'yım." {n}Söylediklerini kavrayıp kavramadığını değerlendiriyormuşçasına duraksıyor.{/n} "İtiraz gelmedi. Bu iyiye işaret. Gelelim talimatlara."

languages.text: «Ahora puedo hablar libremente». {n}Como si se quitara una máscara, Juvenna abandona su imitación de una «noble aburrida» y te observa con interés.{/n} «Veamos. En primer lugar, debe recordar que para la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} soy Elana. Y ahora, para usted también». {n}Hace una pausa, como si buscara ver si comprendes sus palabras.{/n} «Veo que no protesta. Es buena señal. Pasemos a sus instrucciones».
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: «Ahora puedo hablar libremente». {n}Como si se quitara una máscara, Juvenna abandona su imitación de una «noble aburrida» y te observa con interés.{/n} «Veamos. En primer lugar, debe recordar que para la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} soy Elana. Y ahora, para usted también». {n}Hace una pausa, como si buscara ver si comprendes sus palabras.{/n} «Veo que no protesta. Es buena señal. Pasemos a sus instrucciones».

languages.text: « Maintenant, je peux m'exprimer librement. » {n}Juvenna fait immédiatement tomber son masque de noble indifférente et vous observe avec un intérêt marqué.{/n} « Bien. Pour commencer, n'oubliez pas que pour l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, je suis Elana. Et pour vous aussi, désormais. » {n}Elle marque une pause, comme si elle voulait vérifier que vous avez compris le sens de ses paroles.{/n} « Je vois que vous n'avez pas d'objection. C'est bon signe. Passons à vos instructions. »
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: « Maintenant, je peux m'exprimer librement. » {n}Juvenna fait immédiatement tomber son masque de noble indifférente et vous observe avec un intérêt marqué.{/n} « Bien. Pour commencer, n'oubliez pas que pour l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, je suis Elana. Et pour vous aussi, désormais. » {n}Elle marque une pause, comme si elle voulait vérifier que vous avez compris le sens de ses paroles.{/n} « Je vois que vous n'avez pas d'objection. C'est bon signe. Passons à vos instructions. »

languages.text: "Jetzt kann ich frei sprechen." {n}Als würde sie eine Maske ablegen, hört Juvenna sofort auf, die gelangweilte Adelige zu spielen, und betrachtet dich stattdessen mit lebhaftem Interesse.{/n} "Nun denn. Eines nach dem anderen. Ihr müsst daran denken, dass ich für die {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} Elana bin. Und für Euch nun auch." {n}Sie hält einen Moment inne, als würde sie überlegen, ob du sie verstanden hast.{/n} "Ich höre keine Einwände. Das ist ein gutes Zeichen. Kommen wir zu Euren Instruktionen."
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely." {n}Like casting off a mask, Juvenna instantly drops her "bored noblewoman" act and takes to observing you with lively interest.{/n} "Well, then. First things first, you must remember that to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, I am Elana. To you now, as well." {n}She pauses for a moment, as if assessing whether you have grasped what she said.{/n} "I hear no objections. That is a good sign. Let's move on to your instructions."

traits.locale_text: "Jetzt kann ich frei sprechen." {n}Als würde sie eine Maske ablegen, hört Juvenna sofort auf, die gelangweilte Adelige zu spielen, und betrachtet dich stattdessen mit lebhaftem Interesse.{/n} "Nun denn. Eines nach dem anderen. Ihr müsst daran denken, dass ich für die {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} Elana bin. Und für Euch nun auch." {n}Sie hält einen Moment inne, als würde sie überlegen, ob du sie verstanden hast.{/n} "Ich höre keine Einwände. Das ist ein gutes Zeichen. Kommen wir zu Euren Instruktionen."
